title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at India Ratings Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at India Ratings Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, India Ratings Ventures Solutions in Meerut is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About India Ratings Ventures Solutions:
India Ratings Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with India Ratings Ventures Solutions!
